title: World History: Ancient Civilizations
description: Explore the rise and fall of ancient civilizations from Egypt to Rome.
subject: History

questions.prompt: Which ancient wonder was located in Alexandria, Egypt?
questions.explanation: The Lighthouse of Alexandria (Pharos of Alexandria) was one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, located on the island of Pharos near Alexandria.

questions.prompt: Who was the first emperor of Rome?
questions.explanation: Augustus (born Gaius Octavius) became the first Roman Emperor in 27 BC after defeating Mark Antony and Cleopatra.

questions.prompt: The Great Wall of China was primarily built to protect against which group?
questions.explanation: The Great Wall was built over many centuries, primarily to defend against raids by nomadic peoples from the north, including the Mongols.

questions.prompt: In which river valley did the Mesopotamian civilization develop?
questions.explanation: Mesopotamia, meaning 'land between rivers' in Greek, developed in the valley of the Tigris and Euphrates rivers (modern-day Iraq).

questions.prompt: Which pharaoh is associated with the construction of the Great Pyramid of Giza?
questions.explanation: The Great Pyramid of Giza was built as a tomb for Pharaoh Khufu (also known as Cheops) around 2560 BC.
